requirement_topic.en: Energinet / DSO Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Danish Network
requirement_topic.zh: 能源网／配电运营商并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz丹麦电网
requirement_topic.zht: 能源網／配電運營商並網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz丹麥電網

summary.en: Denmark's electricity supply is operated through Energinet (energinet.dk) as the transmission system operator and multiple regional distribution system operators (DSOs), with Forsyningstilsynet (forsyningstilsynet.dk) providing regulatory oversight. The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation. Denmark's high wind penetration and smart-grid development mean that load management, smart-charging profiles, and DSO demand-response coordination may be required for EV charger deployments, especially commercial or fleet installations.
summary.zh: 丹麦电力供应通过能源网（energinet.dk）作为输电系统运营商以及多个区域配电运营商（DSO）运营，供应监管局（forsyningstilsynet.dk）提供监管。低压电网环境为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成配电运营商供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。丹麦高风电渗透率和智能电网发展意味着电动汽车充电桩部署（尤其是商业或车队安装）可能需要负载管理、智能充电方案和配电运营商需求响应协调。
summary.zht: 丹麥電力供應通過能源網（energinet.dk）作為輸電系統運營商以及多個區域配電運營商（DSO）運營，供應監管局（forsyningstilsynet.dk）提供監管。低壓電網環境為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成配電運營商供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能品質審查、調試及書面項目驗收。丹麥高風電滲透率和智能電網發展意味著電動汽車充電樁部署（尤其是商業或車隊安裝）可能需要負載管理、智能充電方案和配電運營商需求響應協調。

standards_or_laws: Danish DSO (distribution system operator) grid-connection and project-acceptance requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
HD 60364-7-722 (CENELEC harmonised document for EV charging installations)

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Denmark 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline. China has no equivalent to Denmark's advanced smart-charging DSO demand-response ecosystem.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：丹麦230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。中国没有与丹麦先进的智能充电配电运营商需求响应生态对应的机制。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：丹麥230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。中國沒有與丹麥先進的智能充電配電運營商需求響應生態對應的機制。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices (Type B RCD or A+DC detection per HD 60364-7-722), metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for Danish DSO review. For Denmark's smart-charging and wind-heavy grid context, load management capability, OCPP smart-charging profile support, and DSO demand-response coordination should be agreed before deployment. Danish-language technical documentation is commonly expected.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件（依据HD 60364-7-722的B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按丹麦配电运营商审查准备。针对丹麦智能充电和高风电电网背景，应在部署前商定负载管理能力、OCPP智能充电方案支持及配电运营商需求响应协调。通常还需要提供丹麦语技术文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件（依據HD 60364-7-722的B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按丹麥配電運營商審查準備。針對丹麥智能充電和高風電電網背景，應在部署前商定負載管理能力、OCPP智能充電方案支持及配電運營商需求響應協調。通常還需要提供丹麥語技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require Danish DSO project review and acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency; smart-charging and load-management requirements may be mandatory for commercial deployments under Danish DSO rules
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Danish DSO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Denmark 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Denmark-ready EVSE needs Danish DSO project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Verify DSO smart-charging and load-management requirements before deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向丹麦的EVSE需要丹麦配电运营商项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。部署前请核实配电运营商的智能充电和负载管理要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向丹麥的EVSE需要丹麥配電運營商項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。部署前請核實配電運營商的智能充電和負載管理要求。
